task_completion.description: Load a wheeled differential-drive mobile robot into the CoppeliaSim scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim GUI is open and a mobile robot model (e.g., Pioneer, KUKA YouBot, or similar from the mobile robots folder) is visible in the 3D scene or listed in the Scene Hierarchy panel.

task_completion.description: Create a closed navigation path with at least 8 distinct waypoints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A path object is visible in the CoppeliaSim 3D view or Scene Hierarchy. In the 3D view, the path should appear as a closed loop with multiple visible control points/waypoints spanning a reasonable area (at least 1.0m x 1.0m).

task_completion.description: Run the simulation to track the path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim simulation is actively running (the 'Play' button is pressed/active, simulation time is advancing) and the robot is moving along the defined path.

task_completion.description: Export timestamped position and heading samples to path_tracking.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file explorer, or text editor shows the file '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/path_tracking.csv'. If open, the file must contain the columns 'sample_id', 'sim_time', 'x', 'y', 'theta' and show at least 20 rows of recorded data.

task_completion.description: Export the path report to path_report.json.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file explorer, or text editor shows the creation or contents of the file '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/path_report.json'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with CoppeliaSim to generate the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the CoppeliaSim GUI being manipulated or a valid Python script utilizing the ZeroMQ Remote API being executed, rather than just creating text files from scratch.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV data contains realistic simulation outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the CSV file should be floating-point numbers that gradually change row-by-row, representing actual movement over time, not static, repeating, or obviously mocked dummy data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually type out the final output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use a script or CoppeliaSim's built-in export functionality to generate the CSV and JSON files. There should be no evidence of the agent manually typing 20+ rows of coordinates into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 8 or more waypoints forming a closed path with a bounding box of at least 1.0m x 1.0m. The simulation must record at least 20 samples. The output files must be exactly located at '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/path_tracking.csv' (containing columns: sample_id, sim_time, x, y, theta) and '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/path_report.json'.
